title: Le Bazaar Milestone 4
description: Milestone 4 of the Le Bazaar Cardano e-learning platform (Catalyst F12-1200107). Delivers: (1) ADA-denominated class pricing with live JPY→ADA exchange rate conversion, ADA purchase via CIP-30 double-sign wallet flow with 10-block pessimistic finality, Stripe credit card purchase (Japan-compliant), parallel payment path presentation with graceful degradation, wallet flow verification, admin-initiated refunds with access revocation, Cardano network status indicator, and student purchase history; (2) Teacher configuration of NFT certificate and token rewards per class, teacher/admin-initiated airdrop with fee estimate, student self-mint via CIP-30 wallet, reward eligibility notifications, reward invalidation on refund (on-chain metadata + platform), and student My Rewards view; (3) Complete removal of all legacy points UI from the frontend (frontend-only scope). Brownfield adoption — existing Laravel 9 / React 18 / Inertia.js codebase with Cardano Helios web3 layer.

pre_conditions: Laravel 9 / PHP 8.2 application with Inertia.js + React 18 is running (Sail)
MySQL database is accessible with current schema (migrations applied)
Blockfrost API key (preprod) is configured in .env for Cardano network access
Helios build toolchain (Node.js) is available in web3/ for script execution
Teachers can create classes priced in JPY (existing platform feature)
Student enrollment and completion tracking is operational (existing platform feature)
post_conditions: Students can purchase classes with ADA via CIP-30 wallet (pessimistic 10-block confirmation)
Students can purchase classes with credit card via Stripe (Japan-compliant)
Teachers can configure NFT certificate and/or token rewards per class
Teachers and admins can airdrop rewards to eligible completed students
Students can self-mint NFT certificates and token rewards via CIP-30 wallet
All legacy points UI is removed from the frontend
All supported CIP-30 wallets function for purchase and minting

acceptance: Student completes end-to-end ADA purchase (connect wallet → quote → sign → 10-block confirmation → access)
Student completes end-to-end Stripe credit card purchase
Teacher configures NFT certificate reward and initiates airdrop to eligible students
Student self-mints NFT certificate via CIP-30 wallet
Zero points-related UI elements visible on any page for any actor
All Playwright E2E tests pass for all four actor workflows
Product demo video demonstrates all 6 acceptance criteria from milestone-4.md
